Appearances:
Plaintiff, James Blanding is present.
Plaintiff is in Pro Per.
Defendant, Frederick Nelson, is present.
Attorney, Hope Greenhill , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Joe Ragazzo, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-27-2010 is vacated.
